testcase.name: test_regression_ai_insights_still_works
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase_h_strategy_lab.py:112: in test_regression_ai_insights_still_works assert r.status_code == 200, f"ai-insights returned {r.status_code}" E AssertionError: ai-insights returned 405 E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_regression_adset_panel_loads
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase_h_strategy_lab.py:123: in test_regression_adset_panel_loads assert r.status_code == 200, f"adsets returned {r.status_code}" E AssertionError: adsets returned 404 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_regression_placement_panel_loads
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase_h_strategy_lab.py:128: in test_regression_placement_panel_loads assert r.status_code == 200, f"placements returned {r.status_code}" E AssertionError: placements returned 404 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
